reviews.review_msg: Eric is a super caring and easygoing prof. He genuinely wants his students to succeed and will take time to go over topics and reaffirm your understanding. His attitude and mindset were especially helpful for ARCH376, as it's an upper-level Quant course, and I struggled with stats. Bonus points, He looks like an academic Matt Damon

Eric was awesome, he always gave you every opportunity to succeed, made things accessible, and was very clear and knowledgeable, was always willing to chat when he was in his office. Put in the work and you'll do well.
P.S. you gotta love the suspenders.
